center.name: 纳马夸国家公园
center.summary: 纳马夸国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-headed canary，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-headed canary (Serinus alario) is a species of finch found in Lesotho, Namibia and South Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-headed canary (Serinus alario) is a species of finch found in Lesotho, Namibia and South Africa
